title: 普通じゃないアンタとアタシで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet—an Umamusume with an intense fixation on being
number one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why her second-place finish at the tryouts came as a shock,
planting seeds of doubt within her. If that's the case...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You want me to have a rematch with Vodka?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...So I can get my revenge for the tryouts? What's the point in that?
choice_data_list: Let's take back your spot as number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You serious?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm on board, but it won't be easy. You do have a plan, I hope?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you want me to save my energy for the end instead of running
at the front? Sorry, but some makeshift plan like that won't be enough
against her.
choice_data_list:
I want you to run one furlong farther in front
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Some trainer you are! Have you ever heard of "stamina management?" Anyone rushing to the front like that is guaranteed to burn out !
choice_data_list: You're not just anyone though, you're number one.
You're not just anyone though, you're number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ughhh fine! We'll do it your way. I just have to do it, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well don't just stand there—there's training to be done! You did prepare a training menu to build up my stamina, riiight?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm warning you—your regimen better be up to par, or you'll regret it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Scarlet and I spend the next few days completely absorbed in
building up her stamina. Before long, the day of the race is upon us...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hm? If it isn't Air Groove! Yoohoo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Teio... So you also came to watch.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: When I heard about a one-on-one between Scarlet and Vodka, I just knew I had to see it! Hey, looks like they're gonna start!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, and what of it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Actually—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet. You ready yet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...I am.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off. You better keep your eyes glued to me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally time—the rematch against Vodka begins!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Scarlet's out front! Is she going with the same strategy as last
time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But didn't this also happen at the tryouts? If this keeps up, won't
Vodka pass her at the final stretch again?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, wait. It appears that things aren't the same as they once were.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wai—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wha—she's going for her last spurt this early?! She barely made it
across the finish line last time, and you're telling me she's gonna keep
this up 'til the end?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're right. It's a reckless maneuver. However!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Back then, I couldn't become number one.)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(My bluff was called, my pride—torn to pieces. I drowned in self-pity,
knowing full well how pathetic I was.)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Even now... I'm still suffering! My body's hot! My throat hurts! I can't
feel my legs! Still—)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Tch... Augh! Why... why!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Why... can't I catch up to her?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (—I want to win! I NEED to win! Nobody's going to be number one—except for me!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (I know that maybe I'm just being way too stubborn... But that's fine!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Right now, let me show you just how pigheaded I can really be!
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heh. Don't think it's gon' be that easy! Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet wrings out the last of her energy as Vodka closes in.
The winner is—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Bravo, Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I... won?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh, dammit! I actually lost—maaan!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Hey, don't go thinkin' things are over.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Got it? Next time, I'm settlin' the score! I won't lose... honor student!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I like your attitude—I'll be waiting! The number one spot will
always belong to me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like my days of aiming to be number one with Daiwa Scarlet
have only begun.
